# About {#sec-about .unnumbered}

## Authors

This research was conducted by the U-Shift Lab at Instituto Superior Técnico - University of Lisbon, in collaboration with the Transportes Metropolitanos de Lisboa (TML).

![](images/logo_acknowledgement_tml.png){width="100%"}

### U-Shift Lab, Instituto Superior Técnico {.unnumbered}

-   **Filipe Moura** – Principal Investigator\
    [fmoura\@tecnico.pt](mailto:fmoura@tecnico.pt){.email} \| [Website](https://ushift.tecnico.ulisboa.pt/team-filipe-moura/) \| [ORCID: 0000-0001-7749-8490](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7749-8490)

-   **Rosa Félix** – Co-Principal Investigator\
    [rosamfelix\@tecnico.pt](mailto:rosamfelix@tecnico.pt){.email} \| [Website](https://www.rosafelix.bike) \| [ORCID: 0000-0002-5642-6006](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5642-6006)

-   **Mauricio Orozco-Fontalvo**\
    [mauricio.orozco\@tecnico.pt](mailto:mauricio.orozco@tecnico.pt){.email} \| [Website](https://ushift.tecnico.ulisboa.pt/team-mauricio-fontalvo/) \| [ORCID: 0000-0003-0514-4647](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0514-4647)

-   **Gonçalo Matos**\
    [goncaloafmatos\@tecnico.pt](mailto:goncaloafmatos@tecnico.pt){.email} \| [Website](http://gmatos.pt/) \| [ORCID: 0009-0001-3489-1732](https://orcid.org/0009-0001-3489-1732)

-   **Miguel Alvelos** – Project Collaborator

-   **Margarida Pimentel** – Project Collaborator

### Transportes Metropolitanos de Lisboa (TML) {.unnumbered}

-   **Camila Garcia** – Departamento de Estudos e Planeamento\
    [camila.garcia\@tmlmobilidade.pt](mailto:camila.garcia@tmlmobilidade.pt){.email} \| [ORCID: 0000-0002-1114-0979](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1114-0979)

-   **Catarina Marcelino** – Departamento de Estudos e Planeamento\
    [catarina.marcelino\@tmlmobilidade.pt](mailto:catarina.marcelino@tmlmobilidade.pt){.email}

## Cite as

``` bibtex
@book{impt_report_2026,
  author    = {Orozco-Fontalvo, Mauricio and Félix, Rosa and Matos, Gonçalo and Moura, Filipe and Garcia, Camila},
  title     = {IMPT — Índice Multidimensional e Multimodal de Pobreza nos Transportes: methodological report},
  year      = {2026},
  month     = {April},
  publisher = {CERIS, Instituto Superior Técnico - University of Lisbon, Lisbon},
  url       = {https://u-shift.github.io/IMPT-data},
  doi       = {10.5281/zenodo.XXXXX}
}
```

## Funding

This research was funded by Science4Policy, a PLANAPP - Centre for Planning and Evaluation of Public Policies iniciative to support the definition and implementation of public policies based on scientific evidence.

![](images/logo_planapp.png){width="100%"}
